profile.title: PROFILE

profile.goalPlaceholder: E.g.: Achieve 10 consecutive muscle-ups, lose body fat...
profile.whatsappShare: 💪 Follow me on Calistenia App and let's train together!
landing.heroDesc: From your first push-up to your first muscle-up. Programs, progress and community.
landing.earlyAccess: Free during early access. No credit card.
landing.trainingDesc: Four periodization phases — from base to peak. Each day has its focus: push, pull, legs, full body. Log sets, reps, weight and RPE.
landing.trainingFeature2: Create and share your own programs
landing.analyticsTitle: See your progress week by week
landing.analyticsDesc: Body weight charts, muscle volume, body measurements, before/after photos and 1RM calculator. Everything is tracked so you can see how far you've come.
landing.featureNutritionDesc: Log meals with barcode or search. Track macros, calories and water.
landing.featureCardioDesc: Run, walk or ride with real-time tracking. Distance, pace and route on the map.
landing.featureSocialDesc: Follow friends, compete in challenges, react to achievements and climb the leaderboard.
landing.featureConsistencyDesc: Activity heatmap, streaks and reminders to keep your rhythm.
landing.featureOfflineDesc: Works without internet. Your data syncs when you're back online.
landing.featureFreeSessionsDesc: Train outside a program. Create custom sessions with any exercise.
landing.installTitle: Install it like a native app
landing.installDesc: Calistenia App is a PWA — install it directly from your browser, no app store needed. Works like a native app on your phone.
landing.installStep1Desc: Visit the app from Chrome or Safari on your phone.
landing.installStep2Desc: In Chrome: menu ⋮ → "Install app". In Safari: share → "Add to Home Screen".
landing.installStep3Desc: Open it from your home screen like any other app.
landing.ctaDesc: No distractions, no hidden subscriptions. Just you, your training and your progress.
landing.footerAbout: Calisthenics, nutrition and cardio app. Made by a practitioner for practitioners.
landing.footerBuiltDesc: Created by a calisthenics practitioner who needed an app that didn't exist. Own code, no ads, no data sold.

dashboard.nudge.subtitle: Don't lose your rhythm — even 20 minutes make a difference.

programs.chooseToStartDesc: A program is your weekly training plan. It has exercises for each day (Push, Pull, Legs...) and phases that increase in difficulty. Choose one and start training today.
programs.deleteConfirm: Delete this program? This action cannot be undone.

reminders.title: REMINDERS
onboarding.howItWorksDetail: you choose a training program and each day has assigned exercises. You enter, follow the guided session and everything is logged.
onboarding.needsProfileHint: First we ask for some basic data, then you choose your program.
onboarding.justChooseProgram: You just need to choose a program to start.
onboarding.skipAll: I already know the app, skip
onboarding.aboutYouDesc: This helps us personalize your experience. Everything is optional.
onboarding.chooseProgramDesc: A program is your weekly plan: it has exercises for each day and phases that increase in difficulty.
onboarding.recommendedHint: RECOMMENDED programs are the best to start with.
onboarding.step1Desc: A program is your weekly exercise plan. It has assigned days (Push, Pull, Legs...) and phases that level up.
onboarding.step2Desc: From the Dashboard tap the day you want. You'll see exercises with sets, reps and rest. Hit START and follow the guided session.
onboarding.step3Desc: Every set you do is saved. You'll see your streak, personal records and weekly progress.
onboarding.nutritionExtraDesc: Log meals with photo and AI. Track macros and calories.
onboarding.cardioExtraDesc: Run, walk or cycle with GPS and live map.
onboarding.socialExtraDesc: Follow friends, compare stats and compete in challenges.

tour.dashboard.sidebar.title: Navigation
tour.dashboard.sidebar.desc: Access all sections from here: workouts, progress, nutrition, programs and more.
tour.dashboard.activeProgram.title: Your active program
tour.dashboard.activeProgram.desc: The program you're currently following. You can change it or create one in Programs.
tour.dashboard.progress.title: Program progress
tour.dashboard.progress.desc: Your current phase and how far along you are. Advance week by week.
tour.dashboard.stats.title: Your stats
tour.dashboard.stats.desc: Sessions, day streak, weekly goal and completion percentage.
tour.dashboard.nutrition.title: AI Nutrition
tour.dashboard.nutrition.desc: Take a photo of your meal and AI calculates calories and macros.
tour.dashboard.weeklyPlan.title: Weekly plan
tour.dashboard.weeklyPlan.desc: Your week: each day has a focus (push, pull, legs...). Completed ones are marked.
tour.workout.phaseSelector.title: Phase selector
tour.workout.phaseSelector.desc: Choose the program phase. Each phase lasts several weeks and increases in difficulty.
tour.workout.daySelector.title: Training day
tour.workout.daySelector.desc: Each day has a different focus (push, pull, legs...). You can do any workout on any real day — you're not limited to the calendar. Green dot = today.
tour.workout.header.title: Workout summary
tour.workout.header.desc: Title, number of exercises and estimated duration of today's workout.
tour.workout.exerciseCard.title: Exercise card
tour.workout.exerciseCard.desc: Each exercise shows sets x reps, rest, priority and muscles. The color bar indicates priority.
tour.workout.quickLog.title: Quick log
tour.workout.quickLog.desc: Tap "+ SET" to log each set. The counter goes up automatically. When all sets are done, rest timer starts.
tour.workout.editSet.title: Weight & details
tour.workout.editSet.desc: Tap the ✏ icon to open the detailed form. There you can log custom reps, added weight in kg (e.g.: vest, dumbbell, band), RPE (effort 1-10) and a note. Weight is saved in your history to track progression.
tour.workout.guidedSession.title: Guided session
tour.workout.guidedSession.desc: Start the step-by-step workout. The app guides you exercise by exercise with rest timers, sounds and notifications.
tour.programs.filters.title: Filter programs
tour.programs.filters.desc: Official ones are curated by coaches. Community ones are created by users. My Programs are yours.
tour.programs.search.title: Search
tour.programs.search.desc: Search programs by name or description.
tour.programs.create.title: Create program
tour.programs.create.desc: Create your own program with custom phases, days and exercises.
tour.nutrition.date.title: Date
tour.nutrition.date.desc: Navigate between days to view or log meals for any date.
tour.nutrition.dashboard.title: Nutrition summary
tour.nutrition.dashboard.desc: Your daily macros: calories, protein, carbs and fat vs your goals.
tour.nutrition.mealLogger.title: Log meal
tour.nutrition.mealLogger.desc: Take a photo of your meal and AI analyzes the nutrients automatically.
tour.progress.summary.title: Progress summary
tour.progress.summary.desc: Overview: sessions, streaks, active weeks and more.
tour.progress.charts.title: Charts by exercise
tour.progress.charts.desc: See how your reps and volume evolve for each exercise over time.
tour.progress.history.title: Session history
tour.progress.history.desc: All your completed sessions with date, phase and details.
tour.exercises.search.title: Search exercises
tour.exercises.search.desc: Search by name among all available exercises.
tour.exercises.categoryFilters.title: Filter by category
tour.exercises.categoryFilters.desc: Filter by type: push, pull, legs, core, mobility and more.
tour.exercises.catalog.title: Exercise catalog
tour.exercises.catalog.desc: Tap an exercise to see videos, description and how to perform it.
tour.profile.personalInfo.title: Personal information
tour.profile.personalInfo.desc: Your name, weight and height. This data is used for nutrition calculations and goals.
tour.profile.level.title: Experience level
tour.profile.level.desc: Set your level so recommendations adjust to your experience.
tour.feed.list.title: Activity feed
tour.feed.list.desc: Here you see your friends' recent workouts. Each card shows who trained, what they did and when.
tour.feed.reaction.title: Reactions
tour.feed.reaction.desc: Tap 🔥 to cheer your friends. Reactions accumulate and they can see them.
tour.friends.tabs.title: Tabs
tour.friends.tabs.desc: "Following" shows who you follow, "Followers" who follows you, and "Search" to find new friends.
tour.friends.search.title: Search friends
tour.friends.search.desc: Type a friend's name to find them. Tap FOLLOW to see their activity in your feed.
tour.leaderboard.categories.title: Ranking categories
tour.leaderboard.categories.desc: Compare sessions, streaks, pull-ups, push-ups, L-sit and handstand with friends. Tap a category to see the ranking.
tour.leaderboard.ranking.title: Ranking
tour.leaderboard.ranking.desc: Your position is highlighted in green. Top three get a medal. Tap a name to see their profile.
tour.challenges.create.title: Create challenge
tour.challenges.create.desc: Create a challenge with friends: pick a metric (sessions, pull-ups, streak...), duration and participants.
tour.challenges.filters.title: Filters
tour.challenges.filters.desc: Toggle between active and finished challenges to see past results.
tour.challenges.list.title: Your challenges
tour.challenges.list.desc: Each card shows the metric, days remaining and participants. Tap to see details and challenge ranking.
tour.cardio.activity.title: Activity type
tour.cardio.activity.desc: Choose between running, walking or cycling. Each type calculates pace or speed differently.
tour.cardio.start.title: Start session
tour.cardio.start.desc: Tap to begin. The app tracks your route with GPS, calculates distance, pace, splits per km and calories burned.
tour.cardio.history.title: History
tour.cardio.history.desc: Your previous cardio sessions with distance, duration and pace.
tour.cardio.stats.title: Stats
tour.cardio.stats.desc: Weekly, monthly summary and personal records from your cardio sessions.
tour.freeSession.search.title: Search exercises
tour.freeSession.search.desc: Search by name or muscle in the full exercise catalog.
tour.freeSession.categories.title: Filter by category
tour.freeSession.categories.desc: Push, pull, legs, core, mobility... filter to find exercises for the muscle group you want.
tour.freeSession.catalog.title: Select exercises
tour.freeSession.catalog.desc: Tap an exercise to add it to your session. The green number shows the order. Tap again to remove it.
tour.freeSession.bar.title: Your session
tour.freeSession.bar.desc: Here you see how many exercises you have, sets and estimated time. Tap to reorder. When ready, tap "Start".
tour.calendar.nav.title: Navigation
tour.calendar.nav.desc: Navigate between months and go back to today. See how many active days and sessions each month has.
tour.calendar.grid.title: Calendar
tour.calendar.grid.desc: Days with sessions appear in green with dots. Tap a day to see details or train.
tour.calendar.detail.title: Day detail
tour.calendar.detail.desc: Here you see that day's sessions or planned workout. Tap a session to see full details.
tour.mealLogger.type.title: Meal type
tour.mealLogger.type.desc: Select whether it's breakfast, lunch, dinner or snack. The app auto-detects based on the time.
tour.mealLogger.input.title: Log meal
tour.mealLogger.input.desc: Type what you ate, take a photo for AI nutrient analysis, log manually, or repeat a previous meal.
tour.mealLogger.barcode.title: Scan barcode
tour.mealLogger.barcode.desc: Scan the barcode of a packaged product to get its nutrients directly from Open Food Facts.
tour.reminders.add.title: Create reminder
tour.reminders.add.desc: Tap Meal, Exercise or Breaks to schedule alerts. Choose time, days of the week and save.
tour.reminders.timeline.title: Timeline
tour.reminders.timeline.desc: Your reminders sorted by time. Toggle each one with the switch. Swipe to delete.
tour.workoutDetail.header.title: Your workout
tour.workoutDetail.header.desc: Here you see the phase, day, number of exercises and estimated duration.
tour.workoutDetail.exerciseCard.title: Exercise card
tour.workoutDetail.exerciseCard.desc: Sets x reps, rest between sets, priority (color) and muscles worked.
tour.workoutDetail.quickLog.title: Quick log
tour.workoutDetail.quickLog.desc: Tap "+ SET" to log each set. The counter goes up automatically and when done the rest timer starts.
tour.workoutDetail.guidedSession.title: Guided session
tour.workoutDetail.guidedSession.desc: Or start the guided session: the app takes you exercise by exercise with rest timers, sounds and notifications.
lumbar.emergency.name: Emergency Protocol
lumbar.emergency.desc: Use this when you feel acute pain. Don't train, just do this.
lumbar.emergency.ex0.note: Decompress the spine immediately. Maximum relief.
lumbar.emergency.ex1.note: Release the piriformis and relax the sciatic nerve.
lumbar.emergency.ex2.name: Child's Pose with traction
lumbar.emergency.ex2.note: Arms extended forward. Let gravity decompress.
lumbar.emergency.ex3.name: Slow Cat-Cow (20 reps)
lumbar.emergency.ex3.note: Increase disc circulation. Feel each vertebra.
lumbar.emergency.ex4.name: Deep Hip Flexor Stretch
lumbar.emergency.ex4.note: Remove the anterior pull on the lumbar spine.
lumbar.morning.name: Morning Routine (Pre-work)
lumbar.morning.desc: Before sitting down to work. 10 minutes that change your day.
lumbar.morning.ex0.name: Cat-Cow Warm-up
lumbar.morning.ex0.note: Wake up the spine before stressing it.
lumbar.morning.ex1.note: Counteract the overnight shortening of the psoas.
lumbar.morning.ex2.name: Glute Bridge activation
lumbar.morning.ex2.note: Activate glutes before they fall asleep sitting.
lumbar.morning.ex3.note: Prepare the whole body for sedentary work.
lumbar.morning.ex4.note: Mobilize the thoracic area before hunching.
lumbar.pausa25.name: Active Break 2 min (every 25 min)
lumbar.pausa25.desc: The automatic break system will alert you. Maximum impact in minimum time.
lumbar.pausa25.ex0.name: Stand up and move
lumbar.pausa25.ex0.note: Just standing up helps. Walk, shake your legs.
lumbar.pausa25.ex1.name: Standing Hip Flexor
lumbar.pausa25.ex1.note: Long step forward, knee back. Feel the stretch.
lumbar.pausa25.ex2.name: Standing Thoracic Rotation
lumbar.pausa25.ex2.note: Hands on head, rotate torso only. Quick and effective.
lumbar.pausa60.name: Active Break 5 min (every hour)
lumbar.pausa60.desc: The most important break of your workday.
lumbar.pausa60.ex2.name: Supine Thoracic Rotation
lumbar.pausa60.ex2.note: If you have space, do this on the floor.
lumbar.pausa60.ex3.note: The neck also gets tense from work.
lumbar.pausa60.ex4.note: Return shoulders to their correct position.
lumbar.cause1.title: Tight Psoas
lumbar.cause1.desc: Sitting 8h shortens the psoas. It pulls the lumbar spine forward.
lumbar.cause2.title: Dormant Glutes
lumbar.cause2.desc: When sitting, glutes shut off. The lumbar compensates and overloads.
lumbar.cause3.title: Stiff Thoracic Spine
lumbar.cause3.desc: Without thoracic mobility, the lumbar rotates in place and gets injured.
lumbarCheck.label: MORNING CHECK
lumbarCheck.title: How are you today?
lumbarCheck.subtitle: 30 seconds · Once a day only
lumbarCheck.lumbarQuestion: How is your lower back today?
lumbarCheck.sleepQuestion: How did you sleep last night?
motivation.quote0: The only bad workout is the one you didn't do.
motivation.quote1: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day after day.
motivation.quote2: Strength does not come from the body. It comes from the will of the soul.
motivation.quote3: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
motivation.quote4: The body achieves what the mind believes.
motivation.quote5: No pain, no gain. Shut up and train.
motivation.quote6: Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.quote7: Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
motivation.quote8: Your body can stand almost anything. It's your mind you have to convince.
motivation.quote9: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
motivation.quote10: The difference between trying and triumphing is just a little more effort.
motivation.quote11: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
motivation.quote12: It never gets easier, you just get stronger.
motivation.quote13: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
motivation.quote14: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act, but a habit.
motivation.quote15: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
motivation.quote16: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
motivation.quote17: Small daily improvements are the key to extraordinary results.
motivation.quote18: Champions aren't made in gyms. They are made from something deep inside them.
motivation.quote19: It's not about being the best. It's about being better than yesterday.
